title: Rosetta Expansion Rule
description: Schema for rules in expand.jsonl. Each rule defines a when-then expansion with optional guards.

args.description: Entity IDs or constants that trigger this rule.

then.description: Result entity ID or capability produced by this rule.

priority.description: Rule priority. Higher values match first.

why.description: Human-readable explanation of the rule's purpose.

requires.description: Capabilities that the subject entity must have.

guard.description: Optional guard conditions for rule activation.

provenance.description: Optional provenance metadata for the rule.
